inputs.label: Current IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: The current value of the inherited IRA account.

inputs.label: Beneficiary's Age
inputs.businessContext: The current age of the beneficiary.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current age of the beneficiary.

inputs.label: Life Expectancy Factor
inputs.businessContext: The IRS single life expectancy factor for the beneficiary's age, used to calculate RMD.

businessContext_i18n.en: The IRS single life expectancy factor for the beneficiary's age, used to calculate RMD.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yararlanıcının yaşına göre IRS tek yaşam beklentisi faktörü, RMD hesaplamasında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der IRS-Lebenserwartungsfaktor für das Alter des Begünstigten, zur Berechnung der RMD.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'espérance de vie unique de l'IRS pour l'âge du bénéficiaire, utilisé pour calculer le RMD.
businessContext_i18n.es: El factor de esperanza de vida individual del IRS para la edad del beneficiario, utilizado para calcular el RMD.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual rate of return on IRA investments, used for projection.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual rate of return on IRA investments, used for projection.
businessContext_i18n.tr: IRA yatırımlarında beklenen yıllık getiri oranı, projeksiyon için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Rendite der IRA-Investitionen, für die Prognose.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annuel attendu sur les investissements IRA, utilisé pour la projection.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual esperada de las inversiones de la IRA, utilizada para la proyección.
